title: Breaking into Impel Down: Key Exchange
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #2, Buggy as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of breaking into impel down: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: I never said that!! Not at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Does Happiness change your memories or something!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They are in position, pull the net!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Damn!!! It's a trap!!! They got us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Give it up, buggy...!! we're already caught...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The guards... and the Blugori are here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Put the Kairouseki Handcuffs on them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Really...? You don't look like a monkey...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No!! you mis- understood!! I am... saldeath!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Accept your fate!! Resistance is futile!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: There was never anywhere to escape to.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: In this isolated sea floor prison,

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of breaking into impel down: key exchange.
